entities.description: t is a structured hierarchical tree that is the result of transforming a raw document
raw document is the initial input that undergoes transformation into a structured hierarchical tree
robust layout parsing is a key step involved in transforming the raw document into a structured hierarchical tree
intelligent section filtering is a key step involved in transforming the raw document into a structured hierarchical tree

relations.description: t represents the structured hierarchical tree which is the outcome of the transformation task described
robust layout parsing is a step used to create the structured hierarchical tree t
intelligent section filtering is a step used to create the structured hierarchical tree t
raw document is the input processed by the robust layout parsing step
raw document is the input processed by the intelligent section filtering step
